intro.name: intro
intro.default:
'Across regulated environments, the challenge is not technology.
It is aligning governance, systems, and operations so data can be used in practice.'

image_caption.default: 'Executive delivery across public sector, financial services, and health systems'

subheading.name: subheading
subheading.default: 'Building Trusted Systems from Policy to Practice'

tagline.default: 'Data Governance • Security Architecture • Operating Models • Digital Infrastructure'

description.name: description
description.default: 'I design systems and operating models that enable organisations to use data in practice, translating policy, regulation, and governance into infrastructure that is secure, usable, and trusted.'
